title: AML/CFT — 反洗钱与反恐融资 / Anti-Money Laundering (FAA-N06)
summary: FAA-N06 要求顾问在建立关系时及存续期间执行 CDD、持续监控并上报可疑交易。 / FAA-N06 requires advisers to perform CDD at onboarding and throughout the relationship, monitor on an ongoing basis, and report suspicious transactions.

sections.heading: 核心规则
sections.body: 建立业务关系前必须完成 CDD:识别并验证客户身份、了解关系目的、识别实益拥有人;高风险客户执行 EDD。

sections.heading: Core rule
sections.body: Complete CDD before establishing the relationship: identify and verify the client, understand the purpose, identify beneficial owners; apply EDD for higher-risk clients.

sections.heading: 监控与上报
sections.body: 关系存续期间须持续监控;发现可疑交易须向 STRO 上报,且不得 tipping-off(泄露已上报,属违法)。

sections.heading: Monitoring & reporting
sections.body: Monitor throughout the relationship; report suspicious transactions to STRO and never tip off the client (disclosing a report is unlawful).

keyPoints: CDD 须在建立关系前完成 / CDD before onboarding
高风险客户执行 EDD / EDD for higher-risk clients
上报 STRO,禁止 tipping-off / Report to STRO; no tipping-off
